message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #333333
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "门店人员" as A
participant "钉钉门店宝" as B
participant "报货中心" as C

A -> B : 申报货物
B -> C : 下发申报货物单据

C -> C : 单据数据校验
C -> C : 单据储存

C --> B
B --> A

@enduml
